description: The design of computer systems and components. Processor design, instruction set design, and addressing; control structures and microprogramming; memory management, caches, and memory hierarchies; and interrupts and I/O structures.E C E 551or knowledge of Verilog is recommended.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (E C E/​COMP SCI  352andE C E/​COMP SCI  354) or graduate/professional standing
